data.title: Generational Group advises sale of The Prinzo Group, Inc. to Mauldin & Jenkins on Jan 2, 2025. Prinzo Group HQ in Alpharetta, GA - consulting firm for government agencies.
data.description: Based in Dallas, Generational Group recently facilitated the acquisition of The Prinzo Group, Inc. by Mauldin & Jenkins, a deal that concluded on January 2, 2025. The Prinzo Group, Inc., headquartered in Alpharetta, Georgia, is known for its expertise in aiding state and local government agencies in updating processes, systems, and handling procurement challenges. This transaction marks a significant milestone for both companies in the mergers and acquisitions sector.

data.title: Bitwise launches Bitcoin, Ether, and Solana ETPs on Nasdaq Stockholm, offering investors crypto exposure in native currency.
data.description: Bitwise has recently unveiled listings on a regulated exchange in Europe, offering investors access to spot and staking-based crypto products in local currency. This move demonstrates the company's commitment to expanding its presence in the region and providing opportunities for investors to engage in the growing crypto market.

data.title: Price predictions for 1/14: BTC near $100k, ETH & select alts eyeing fresh 2026 highs. Are technical charts signaling restart of bull market?
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is getting closer to $100,000, while Ethereum (ETH) and some other alternative cryptocurrencies are aiming for new highs in 2026. A surge in prices suggests a potential restart of the bull market, according to analysis of technical charts.

data.title: Nasdaq nears critical level, small caps weaken, Amazon stocks see decline. China names rally.
data.description: In the afternoon trading session, small cap stocks experienced a decline. Amazon.com emerged as a significant loser in the Dow. The Nasdaq neared a critical level as it fell. Meanwhile, several China-based stocks saw an increase in value. This news was covered live by Investor's Business Daily, providing insights into the stock market trends of the day.

data.title: Anchor Loans had a record $5.4 billion in loan originations in 2025, a 117% increase from the previous year, for US housing development.
data.description: A California-based company has finished expanding and integrating its platform to fund housing development and construction projects in the US. On January 14, 2026, Anchor Loans disclosed that they achieved a significant milestone with $5.4 billion in loan origination volume in 2025, showcasing a remarkable 117% increase compared to the previous year.

Geopolitical risks keep making headlines, but markets are not reacting with fear. Recent Trump related moves have led to bullish follow-through, not sustained volatility. Trends remain intact for now.

data.title: ATW Partners to invest $50 million in Frax's frxUSD stablecoin, custodied by BitGo. Joint initiative announced.
data.description: In Las Vegas on January 14, 2026, ATW Partners, Frax, and BitGo Bank & Trust revealed a collaboration where ATW Partners, an investment firm from New York, along with its affiliates and portfolio companies, will invest a maximum of $50 million in a joint initiative.

data.title: JBDI Holdings faces delisting warning from Nasdaq due to failure to maintain minimum bid price of $1 for 30 days.
data.description: In Singapore, on January 14, 2026, JBDI Holdings Limited (Nasdaq: JBDI) announced that it received a written notification on January 7, 2026, from The Nasdaq Stock Market LLC regarding its failure to maintain a minimum bid price of $1.00 for its ordinary shares over the last 30 consecutive business days. This is a requirement under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5550(a)(2). Despite this notification, the Company's ordinary shares with the symbol "JBDI" will not be immediately delisted, and there will be no immediate impact on their listing or trading on the Nasdaq Capital Market.

data.title: MediCapture debuts aiScope™ Pilot for Veterinary Sciences at VMX 2026 to run Vision AI models in real-time. #MediCapture #aiScope #VMX2026
data.description: In Cherokee, Texas on January 14, 2026, MediCapture Inc. introduced aiScope™, a software designed to implement Vision AI models quickly and efficiently. The software is set to enable real-time training and practical use of medical artificial intelligence. MediCapture Inc. is a prominent provider of medical imaging systems worldwide.
